When Mercury cuts across the stars Uttaraphalgum, Krttika,
Uttarabhadrapada and Bharanl, all living beings will be afflicted
with diseases arising from the vitiation or diminution of the seven
constituent elements of the body viz. muscle, bone, blood, skin,
semen, fat and marrow.

When Mercury cuts through any one of the three Porva stars,
(Purvaphalguni, Piirvasadha and Purvabhadra), people will suffer
from hunger, armed conflict, robbers, diseases and panic.
